text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Holy cow! You got so many! Way to go, Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And they're all so fluffy and cute! They look so
happy to have been grabbed up and—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I don't think I'll use them in my spells after
all. I can do anything, doll or no doll!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And if push comes to shove, I can always use you
instead, Familiar! I'll just put all these in my room!
